questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. Call it a day
options: Involve many people for a simple job
questions.explanation: A) Call it a day(idiom) – To stop working on something, especially when deciding to finish for the day. It is used to indicate that the work or activity has come to an end for now. किसी काम को बंद करना

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words. The land that is best suitable for growing crops
questions.explanation: C)Arable(noun/adjective) – Land suitable for growing crops उपजाऊ भूमि Fruitful(adjective) – Producing good results or being productive; producing fruit. फलदायी / उत्पादक Barren(adjective) – Land that is too poor to produce vegetation; unproductive. बंजर Rustic(adjective) – Relating to the countryside; simple or rural. देहाती

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. Sathish remained unwavering in the face of the assaulting gang, standing as resolute as ________.
questions.explanation: B) 'Steel' का use होगा क्योंकि "steel" का अर्थ होता है मजबूत और दृढ़, जैसे लोहा। sentence में mention किया गया है कि Sathish गैंग के सामने अडिग और दृढ़ खड़ा रहा, इसलिए 'steel' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'stall' का अर्थ है रुकना या ठहरना, 'steal' का अर्थ है चोरी करना, और 'still' का अर्थ है शांत या अभी भी, जो इस context में सही नहीं है। 'Steel' will be used because it means strong and unyielding, like iron. The sentence mentions that Sathish remained unwavering and resolute against the gang, making 'steel' the correct choice. Whereas, 'stall' means to pause or delay, 'steal' means to take unlawfully, and 'still' means calm or motionless, which do not fit in this context.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. Once in a blue moon
questions.explanation: C)Once in a blue moon(idiom) – A rare occurrence (एक दुर्लभ घटना) Something that happens very rarely or infrequently बहुत कम या दुर्लभ रूप से होने वाली घटना

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. A) A. Now, that the real estate sector has got its own regulator, RERA, from May 1, 2017, things are expected to improve. B) For many of the homebuyers, across locations the delay has extended to almost six years or more. C) In the absence of a regulator and with no rules in place, the builder-buyer battle appeared one-sided. D) For the buyers of real estate properties the delay in possession of their homes has been the biggest concern.
questions.explanation: A) DBCA

questions.question: Select the option that correctly rectifies the underlined spelling error. Thank you for this jar of asorted cookies.
questions.explanation: B) The correct spelling of the underlined word "asorted" is "assorted", which means "consisting of different kinds; mixed" विविध प्रकार का, मिश्रित.

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given italicize word. Her cheerful demeanor tends to bely the deep anxiety she often feels inside.
questions.explanation: D) Bely(verb) – contradict, misrepresent, falsify, conceal, disguise झुठलाना Synonym: Contradict(verb) – Show opposite (विरोधाभास दर्शाना) Confirm(verb) – Verify or support (पुष्टि करना) Reveal(verb) – Uncover or show (प्रकट करना) Validate(verb) – To prove correct (सही सिद्ध करना)

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word.
questions.explanation: A) The correct spelling of ‘Naviggetion’is ‘Navigation’, which means “the process of accurately determining one's position and planning a route.”"दिशा-निर्देशन का कार्य।"

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. Though Amal took continuous medication, he was not able to __________________ his injury.
questions.explanation: C) 'Heal' का use होगा क्योंकि "heal" का अर्थ होता है घाव या चोट का ठीक होना। sentence में mention किया गया है कि Amal ने लगातार दवाई ली, फिर भी वह अपनी चोट को ठीक नहीं कर पाया, इसलिए 'heal' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'Heel' का अर्थ है एड़ी (पैर का हिस्सा), 'Hill' का अर्थ है पहाड़ी, और 'Hail' का अर्थ है ओले गिरना या सलाम करना, जो इस context में सही नहीं है। 'Heal' will be used because it means to recover from an injury or wound. The sentence mentions that Amal took continuous medication but was not able to recover from his injury, making 'heal' the correct choice. Whereas, 'Heel' refers to the back part of the foot, 'Hill' means a small mountain, and 'Hail' refers to frozen rain or greeting someone, which are irrelevant here

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given italicize word. The company managed to leverage its social media presence to increase brand awareness rapidly.
questions.explanation: C) Leverage(verb) – utilize, exploit, capitalize on, use, apply लाभ उठाना Synonym: Utilize(verb) – Make use of (उपयोग करना) Ignore(verb) – Pay no attention (अनदेखा करना) Avoid(verb) – Keep away from (बचना) Waste(verb) – Misuse (बर्बाद करना)

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the underlined word. "He was notorious for his avaricious behavior, always seeking ways to accumulate more wealth."
questions.explanation: C)Greedy(adjective) – having an intense and selfish desire for wealth or possessions. लोभी Avaricious(adjective) – having or showing an extreme greed for wealth or material gain. लालची, लोभी Notorious(adjective) – famous or well-known for a bad quality or deed. बदनाम Sloth(noun) – reluctance to work or make an effort; laziness. आलस्य Generous(adjective) – showing kindness and a willingness to give more than is necessary. उदार

questions.question: Select the most appropriate idiom to fill in the blank. Getting a sudden promotion and increment in my current profile was like _________.
questions.explanation: A)A bolt from the blue (idiom) –A sudden and unexpected event. अचानक और अप्रत्याशित घटना। a foul play(idiom)– Dishonest or violent behavior. अनैतिक या हिंसक व्यवहार a ballpark figure(idiom)– An approximate estimate. लगभग अनुमान। a fish out of water(idiom) – Someone who feels uncomfortable or out of place. असहज या असामान्य स्थिति में होना।

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given italicize word. The relentless waves continued to batter the coastal defenses during the storm.
questions.explanation: B) Batter (verb)– pummel, strike, beat (प्रहार करना)Synonym: Strike (verb)– to hit hard (मारना)Protect (verb)– to guard (सुरक्षित करना)Support (verb)– to hold up (सहारा देना)Cover (verb)– to enclose (ढंकना)

questions.question: Select the best express Antonym of the given italicize word. His hearing impairment made it difficult for him to follow conversations in noisy environments.
questions.explanation: C) Impairment(noun) – weakening, damage, reduction, degradation, hindrance ह्रास / क्षति Antonym: Enhancement(noun) – Improvement, boost, betterment. सुधार Damage(noun) – Harm, injury, impairment. क्षति Weakening(noun) – Loss of strength, deterioration. कमजोर होना Degradation(noun) – Deterioration, decline in quality. ह्रास

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. Ramesh is fond at playing guitar in his free time.
questions.explanation: A)fond" के साथ सही Preposition "of" का use होता है। "fond of" का use किसी चीज़ के प्रति liking या affection को व्यक्त करने के लिए किया जाता है। इस sentence में, रमेश अपने खाली समय में गिटार बजाना पसंद करता है, इसलिए सही sentence होगा "Ramesh is fond of playing guitar." The correct preposition to use with "fond" is "of." The phrase "fond of" is used to express liking or affection for something. In this sentence, Ramesh enjoys playing the guitar in his free time, so the correct phrase is "Ramesh is fond of playing guitar."

questions.question: Select the best express Antonym of the given italicize word. Her artistic prowess was evident in the intricate details of every painting she created.
questions.explanation: B) Prowess(noun) – skill, ability, talent, competence, strength कौशल Antonym: Ineptitude(noun) – Lack of skill or ability, incompetence, clumsiness. अयोग्यता Skill(noun) – Ability, expertise, competence. कौशल Competence(noun) – The ability to do something successfully or efficiently. कुशलता Talent(noun) – Natural aptitude or skill. प्रतिभा

questions.question: Select the best express Antonym of the given italicize word. Despite his exhortation to remain calm, the crowd grew increasingly restless.
questions.explanation: B) Exhortation(noun) – urging, encouragement, appeal, persuasion, advice उत्साहवर्धन / उपदेश Antonym: Discouragement(noun) – The act of discouraging, making someone less confident or enthusiastic. हतोत्साह Persuasion(noun) – The act of convincing someone to believe or do something. मनाना Urging(noun) – Strong recommendation or encouragement. आग्रह Appeal(noun) – A formal request for help or consideration. अपील

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. (1) we knocked across (2) early on Saturday (3) to enjoy (4) the beautiful weather.
questions.explanation: A) 'knocked across' के बदले 'knocked around' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि 'knocked around' एक Phrasal Verb है जिसका अर्थ है 'to visit casually or spend time idly' जबकि 'knocked across' का कोई सही अर्थ नहीं होता है।\ 'knocked around' will be used instead of 'knocked across' because 'knocked around' is a Phrasal Verb which means 'to visit casually or spend time idly' whereas 'knocked across' does not have any correct meaning.

questions.question: Identify the error in the usage of the future tense in the given sentence and choose the correct sentence from the following options. Parvati finish the painting in one hour
options: Parvati will finish the painting in one hour.
Parvati had been finishing the painting in one hour.
Parvati was finished the painting in one hour.
Parvati has been finishing the painting in one hour.
questions.explanation: A) Parvati will finish the painting in one hour will finish'का use होगा क्योंकि वाक्य Future Tense में है और verb 'finish' को सहायक क्रिया 'will' की आवश्यकता है। अतः वाक्य को सही Future Tense में परिवर्तित करने के लिए सहायक क्रिया 'will' और main verb 'finish' का उपयोग किया जाएगा। उदाहरण— "She will complete her work tomorrow." 'will finish'will be used because the sentence is in the future tense, and the verb 'finish' requires the auxiliary verb 'will.' Hence, to form the correct future tense, the auxiliary verb 'will' and the main verb 'finish' are used. Example— "She will complete her work tomorro

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. A) After around 20 minutes of the crash, the tanker caught fire and exploded. B) On Saturday, an oil tanker in Tanzania lost control and overturned on a busy road. C) Around 150 people gathered near the tanker and some of them tried to siphon away some fuel. D) At least 61 people died and 70 more were injured.
questions.explanation: B) BCAD

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Words convey meaning, because they are used in human activities in different forms. Different words may (1) ______ the same thing in different languages and this is what is referred to as 'family resemblance.' In other words, languages help us (2) ______ reality and then communicate it to others. There are tens and thousands of languages in the world and all of them help us (3) ______ express ourselves, which in turn, gives meaning to our life. One's mother tongue is (4) ______ for one's literary growth, but if you want to communicate to a wider audience, then you will (5) ______ to reach out to the target audience in a language they understand. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 1
questions.explanation: C) Meanका use होगा क्योंकि यहाँ बात विभिन्न भाषाओं में एक ही चीज़ के समान अर्थ को व्यक्त करने की हो रही है। "Mean" शब्द का प्रयोग यह दर्शाने के लिए होता है कि कुछ क्या संकेत देता है या क्या अर्थ रखता है। प्रश्न में कहा गया है कि विभिन्न शब्द विभिन्न भाषाओं में एक ही चीज़ का 'अर्थ' दे सकते हैं। इसलिए 'mean' यहाँ सही है। 'Meaningful' का अर्थ होता है महत्वपूर्ण, 'Meaning' का अर्थ है अर्थ जो एक noun है, और 'Meant' का अर्थ है इरादा रखा गया, जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं है। Mean'should be used because it's about expressing the same concept in different languages. The word 'mean' is used to indicate what something signifies or what it is intended to convey. The question states that different words may 'mean' the same thing in different languages. Hence, 'mean' fits here. 'Meaningful' implies significance, 'Meaning' is a noun denoting what is meant by a word, and 'Meant' is the past tense of 'mean', indicating intention, which are incorrect in this context

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Words convey meaning, because they are used in human activities in different forms. Different words may (1) ______ the same thing in different languages and this is what is referred to as 'family resemblance.' In other words, languages help us (2) ______ reality and then communicate it to others. There are tens and thousands of languages in the world and all of them help us (3) ______ express ourselves, which in turn, gives meaning to our life. One's mother tongue is (4) ______ for one's literary growth, but if you want to communicate to a wider audience, then you will (5) ______ to reach out to the target audience in a language they understand. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 2.
questions.explanation: C) Comprehend'का use होगा क्योंकि "comprehend" का अर्थ होता है किसी चीज़ को समझना या ग्रहण करना। passage में बताया गया है कि भाषाएँ हमें वास्तविकता को समझने और फिर उसे दूसरों के साथ साझा करने में मदद करती हैं, इसलिए 'comprehend' यहाँ उपयुक्त है। जबकि 'Commend' का अर्थ होता है प्रशंसा करना, 'Depend' का अर्थ होता है निर्भर करना, और 'Amend' का अर्थ होता है संशोधन करना, जो इस context में सही नहीं है Comprehend'should be used because it means to understand or grasp something. The passage explains that languages help us understand reality and then share it with others, making 'comprehend' appropriate here. Whereas, 'Commend' means to praise, 'Depend' means to rely on, and 'Amend' means to modify, which don't fit in this context

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Words convey meaning, because they are used in human activities in different forms. Different words may (1) ______ the same thing in different languages and this is what is referred to as 'family resemblance.' In other words, languages help us (2) ______ reality and then communicate it to others. There are tens and thousands of languages in the world and all of them help us (3) ______ express ourselves, which in turn, gives meaning to our life.One's mother tongue is (4) ______ for one's literary growth, but if you want to communicate to a wider audience, then you will (5) ______ to reach out to the target audience in a language they understand. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 3.
questions.explanation: C) 'Effectively'का use होगा क्योंकि "effectively" का अर्थ होता है किसी काम को प्रभावी ढंग से करना। passage में बताया गया है कि विभिन्न भाषाएँ हमें अपनी भावनाओं और विचारों को व्यक्त करने में मदद करती हैं, इसलिए 'effectively' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'Retrospectively' का अर्थ है पीछे मुड़कर देखना, 'Secretly' का अर्थ है गुप्त रूप से, और 'Lately' का अर्थ है हाल ही में, जो इस context में सही नहीं है Effectively'should be used because it means to do something in an effective manner. The passage mentions that all languages help us to express ourselves, which in turn, gives meaning to our life, making 'effectively' fitting here. Whereas, 'Retrospectively' means looking back, 'Secretly' means in a hidden way, and 'Lately' means recently, which don't fit in this context

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Words convey meaning, because they are used in human activities in different forms. Different words may (1) ______ the same thing in different languages and this is what is referred to as 'family resemblance.' In other words, languages help us (2) ______ reality and then communicate it to others. There are tens and thousands of languages in the world and all of them help us (3) ______ express ourselves, which in turn, gives meaning to our life.One's mother tongue is (4) ______ for one's literary growth, but if you want to communicate to a wider audience, then you will (5) ______ to reach out to the target audience in a language they understand. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 4
questions.explanation: A)

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. Words convey meaning, because they are used in human activities in different forms. Different words may (1) ______ the same thing in different languages and this is what is referred to as 'family resemblance.' In other words, languages help us (2) ______ reality and then communicate it to others. There are tens and thousands of languages in the world and all of them help us (3) ______ express ourselves, which in turn, gives meaning to our life.One's mother tongue is (4) ______ for one's literary growth, but if you want to communicate to a wider audience, then you will (5) ______ to reach out to the target audience in a language they understand. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 5.
questions.explanation: A)
